description.en: Start Shizuku via WebADB directly from your browser, no local ADB installation or drivers required.
description.zh_cn: 无需安装 ADB，浏览器一键激活 Shizuku

msg_disclaimer.en:
By connecting your device, you authorize this webpage to interact with your device via the ADB protocol. Please ensure you understand the risks associated with this operation.

This webpage will not modify your system settings or collect your private data; it is solely for helping you start Shizuku. (Source Code)
msg_disclaimer.zh_cn:
连接您的设备即表示您授权此网页通过 ADB 协议与您的设备进行交互。请务必了解此操作相关的风险。

此网页不会修改您的系统设置或收集您的个人数据；它仅用于帮助您启动 Shizuku。(源代码)

msg_browser_not_support_webusb.en: Your current browser does not support WebUSB. Please open this page in Chrome or Edge browser.
msg_browser_not_support_webusb.zh_cn: 当前浏览器不支持 WebUSB，建议使用 Chrome 或 Edge 浏览器打开本页面。

msg_checkif_usb_cable.en: 1. Please check if the USB cable is connected.

msg_checkif_usb_debugging.en: 2. Please check if developer options and USB debugging are enabled on the target device.
msg_checkif_usb_debugging.zh_cn: 2. 请检查目标设备上是否启用了开发者选项和 USB 调试。

msg_allow_debugging.en: Please tap "OK" on ${deviceName} to allow debugging.
msg_allow_debugging.zh_cn: 请在目标设备 ${deviceName}  点击 “确定” 以允许 USB 调试。

msg_adb_in_used.en: If other adb programs are already running, please execute adb kill-server to stop them first.
msg_adb_in_used.zh_cn: 如果有其他 ADB 程序正在连接，请先运行 adb kill-server 停止执行。

msg_close_android_studio.en: If Android Studio is open, please close it first.
msg_close_android_studio.zh_cn: 如果打开了 Android Studio，也请先关闭它。

msg_checkif_shizuku_installed.zh_cn: 正在检查是否已安装 Shizuku 。。。

msg_plz_update_shizuku.en: Please update Shizuku to v13.6 or later.
msg_plz_update_shizuku.zh_cn: 请将 Shizuku 更新至 v13.6  以上。

msg_no_shizuku_script.zh_cn: 未检测到 Shizuku 启动程序。

msg_shizuku_start_succ.en: Shizuku started successfully. You can unplug the USB cable now.
msg_shizuku_start_succ.zh_cn: Shizuku 启动成功！现在可以拔掉 USB 线了。

msg_wireless_debugging_activated.en:
Wireless debugging on this target device ${deviceName} is activated.
Now, you can start Shizuku via wireless debugging without pairing.
msg_wireless_debugging_activated.zh_cn:
目标设备 ${deviceName} 已激活无线调试。
现在可以跳过配对步骤直接通过无线调试启动 Shizuku 了。

msg_to_adb_connect.zh_cn: 现在可以通过命令来连接：adb connect ${_target}

msg_apkz_launching.zh_cn: 即将在目标设备 ${deviceName} 打开安大师。
